center.name: 威廉·亨利·赛克斯
center.summary: 威廉·亨利·赛克斯是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Painted bush quail、灰头林鸽、红脚苦恶鸟等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | taxon = Perdicula erythrorhyncha | authority = (Sykes, 1832) | synonyms = Microperdix erythrorhynchusCryptoplectron erythrorhynchusMicroperdix blewitti }} The painted bush quail (Perdicula erythrorhyncha) is a species of quail found in the hill forests of India

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sykes's nightjar, Sykes' nightjar, Sind nightjar or Sindh nightjar (Caprimulgus mahrattensis) is a nightjar species found in northwestern South Asia. This species has a large range with stable population size and therefore has been listed as "Least Concern" with no prediction of substantial human influence on their habitats in the near future.{{Cite web |last=Nigel Cleere |first=Cleere |last2=Guy |first2=M

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Indian golden oriole (Oriolus kundoo) is a species of oriole found in the Indian subcontinent and Central Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sykes's lark (Galerida deva) is a species of lark found in the dry open country of India

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Nilgiri wood pigeon (Columba elphinstonii) is a large pigeon found in the moist deciduous forests and sholas of the Western Ghats in southwestern India

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The large gray babbler (Argya malcolmi) is a member of the family Leiothrichidae found across India and far western Nepal

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown crake (Zapornia akool), or brown bush-hen, is a waterbird in the rail and crake family (Rallidae) found in South Asia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sykes's warbler (Iduna rama) is an Old World warbler in the tree warbler family
